segments.text: listen and then answer the question.
How long had the police taken to find his bicycle?

translation.text: 警方花了多长时间才找到他的自行车？

segments.text: Dan Robinson has been worried all week.

translation.text: 丹·鲁宾逊整个星期都忧心忡忡。

segments.text: Last Tuesday he received a letter from the local police.

translation.text: 上星期二，他收到当地警察局的一封信。

segments.text: In the letter, he was asked to call at the station.

translation.text: 信中让他到警察局去一趟。

segments.text: Dan wondered why he was wanted by the police.

translation.text: 丹不明白警方为什么要找他。

segments.text: But he went to the station yesterday and now he is not worried anymore.

translation.text: 但他昨天去了警察局，现在再也不担心了。

segments.text: At the station, he was told by a smiling policeman that his bicycle had been found.

translation.text: 在警察局里，一位面带笑容的警察告诉他，他的自行车找到了。

segments.text: Five days ago, the policeman told him, the bicycle was picked up in a small village 400 miles away.

translation.text: 警察告诉他，五天前有人在400英里外的一个小村庄发现了那辆自行车。

segments.text: It is now being sent to his home by train.

translation.text: 现在正用火车把它运到他家。

segments.text: Dan was most surprised when he heard the news.

translation.text: 丹听到这个消息时非常惊讶。

segments.text: He was amused too, because he never expected the bicycle to be found.

translation.text: 他也觉得好笑，因为他从没指望这辆自行车还能找回来。

segments.text: It was stolen 20 years ago when Dan was a boy of 15.

translation.text: 这辆车是20年前丹还是个15岁少年时被偷的。
